# We Ship Software (.com)

The weshipsoftware.com website is built with [Alternator] and hosted
on [Github Pages]. Requests are pointed at the root (`.`) directory.
Pushes to the `main` branch are deployed.

```shell
weshipsoftware.github.io % alternator .src . -wp 8080
[watch] watching .src for changes
[serve] serving . at http://localhost:8080
^C to stop
```

[Alternator]: https://weshipsoftware.com/tools/alternator
[Github Pages]: https://docs.github.com/en/pages
